tools.name: ChatGPT
tools.tagline: AI-powered chatbot for writing, coding, and more
tools.description: ChatGPT is a conversational AI model developed by OpenAI. It can assist with writing, coding, brainstorming, learning, and much more. With its natural language understanding, ChatGPT has become one of the most popular AI tools worldwide.
pros: Easy to use, no learning curve
cons: May have capacity issues during peak times
tools.best_for: Writers, developers, students, researchers, marketers, and anyone needing AI assistance

tools.name: Claude
tools.tagline: Constitutional AI for safer, more helpful conversations
tools.description: Claude is an AI assistant created by Anthropic. It excels at long-form content, analysis, and maintaining context over extended conversations. Claude is designed with safety and helpfulness as core principles.
tools.best_for: Writers, researchers, analysts, legal professionals, anyone working with long documents

tools.name: Midjourney
tools.tagline: AI art generator creating stunning images from text
tools.description: Midjourney is one of the most popular AI image generators. It creates high-quality, artistic images from text descriptions. Known for its unique aesthetic style and ease of use through Discord.
cons: Can be slow during peak times
tools.best_for: Artists, designers, content creators, marketers, anyone needing high-quality AI art

tools.name: DALL-E 3
tools.tagline: Advanced AI image generator with precise prompt following
tools.description: DALL-E 3 is OpenAI's latest image generation model. It excels at understanding complex prompts and generating images that closely match your description. Integrated with ChatGPT for enhanced prompt refinement.
cons: Requires ChatGPT Plus for full access
tools.best_for: Content creators, marketers, designers who need precise image generation

tools.name: Runway
tools.tagline: AI-powered video editing and generation platform
tools.description: Runway is a comprehensive AI video platform offering text-to-video, image-to-video, video editing, and more. It's used by professional creators and studios for cutting-edge video production.
pros: Multiple AI video tools in one platform
cons: Can be expensive for heavy use
tools.best_for: Video creators, filmmakers, content creators, marketing teams

tools.name: ElevenLabs
tools.tagline: Most realistic AI voice generator and text-to-speech
tools.description: ElevenLabs is the leading AI voice generation platform. It creates incredibly realistic voices from text, supports voice cloning, and offers multilingual capabilities. Widely used for audiobooks, podcasts, and content creation.
cons: Voice cloning requires good audio sample
tools.best_for: Podcasters, audiobook creators, content creators, educators, marketers

tools.name: GitHub Copilot
tools.tagline: AI pair programmer that helps you write code faster
tools.description: GitHub Copilot is an AI coding assistant powered by OpenAI Codex. It suggests code completions, entire functions, and helps developers write code faster and with fewer errors.
tools.best_for: Professional developers, software engineers, coding students

tools.name: Jasper
tools.tagline: AI content platform for enterprise marketing teams
tools.description: Jasper is an AI writing platform designed for marketing teams and businesses. It offers templates, brand voice customization, and team collaboration features for creating marketing content at scale.
tools.best_for: Marketing teams, agencies, businesses, professional content creators

tools.name: Stable Diffusion
tools.tagline: Open-source AI image generator with full control
tools.description: Stable Diffusion is an open-source AI image generation model. Unlike other tools, it can be run locally on your computer, giving you complete control and privacy. Popular among technical users and artists.
cons: Needs powerful GPU for local use
tools.best_for: Technical users, artists, developers, privacy-conscious users

tools.name: Copy.ai
tools.tagline: AI copywriter for marketing and sales content
tools.description: Copy.ai is an AI writing tool focused on marketing and sales copy. It offers templates for ads, emails, social media posts, and more. Designed to help marketers create compelling copy quickly.
tools.best_for: Marketers, copywriters, social media managers, small business owners
